description_long: This object is an elaborate, fantastical crustacean-like figure with a humanoid upper body and a long, flowing, finned tail. Its body is adorned in a deep red, robe-like carapace that extends into a dramatic, spiked tail fin, reminiscent of a lionfish or sea creature. The figure has two large, curved, horn-like appendages on its head, and its arms are elongated with purple, claw-like hands. Black, feathered or finned wings extend from its back, adding to its imposing and otherworldly appearance. The face is humanoid with long, white hair and intricate markings, while the body is decorated with colorful, scale-like patterns. The overall design is highly stylized, blending crustacean and mythical elements, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A striking, humanoid crustacean figure with a red, finned tail, black wing-like appendages, and large, horned head, adorned with colorful markings and elongated claws.
description_view_0: Front view shows the humanoid face, large horns, black wings, red carapace, and colorful body markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the tail, the profile of the horns, and the layered wings.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the expansive black wings, the full spread of the spiked tail fin, and the back of the head and horns.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tail's curve, horn profile, and wing structure.
